zohoProductPageLayout.zohoHighlightSectionText: Make the most of your day by prioritizing your daily tasks on 135-Todo.
zohoProductPageLayout.zohoHighlightSectionTitle: Plan Your WorkWork Your Plan

zohoModuleList.zohoModuleListText: Equip every individual in your organization with a unified platform. Employees can easily write down their daily tasks, order them strictly by priority, mark the time spent, and check them off upon completion to maintain personal accountability.

Provide managers with transparent, company-wide access to their team’s daily workload. Supervisors can effortlessly check their team’s ongoing tasks, monitor overall completion rates, and assign new tasks directly to reportees.

Maintain a clean daily agenda by utilizing the future task list. The system allows users to seamlessly move and copy tasks to future dates, ensuring that lower priority items are safely stored and nothing falls through the cracks.

Keep a precise record of the time spent on each individual task. Through intuitive visual dashboards, management can actively monitor organizational productivity, evaluate compliance, and optimize how the team plans their work.

Designed to be quick and easy to use, 135-Todo removes the friction of complex software implementations. You can rapidly set up users, define reporting relationships, and start planning tasks immediately.

zohoCrmServiceList.zohoCrmServiceListText: Complete your most important tasks before tackling minor ones.
Build a strong, company-wide habit of daily planning.
Give employees a tangible sense of daily accomplishment.
Learn to plan better for teams and balance workloads.
Ensure company-wide visibility for managers tracking compliance.

zohoEngagementModelList.zohoEngagementModelListText: Configure your users and establish clear reporting relationships within the dashboard.
Plan your personal tasks and and also assign necessary tasks to your team.
Review real-time reports on task completion, time tracking, and team compliance.

realWorldResults.description: To-Do lists help to maintain a list and calendars track appointments and events, the use of a Daily Priority Planner ensures that planned things are completed without fail. By prioritzing the day the team ensures that not the urgent but the important gets done. The satisfaction of completion fulfills the purpose of the day.
realWorldResults.title: The 1-3-5 Tool is Built to Grow Productivity by 300%
